domain: jewelry tools, watchmaking fixtures, clock mechanisms, small precision repair jigs, and wearable hardware

ideas.product_context: Jewelry bench tool for reshaping distorted ring bands before sizing or solder repair.
ideas.core_function: Holds a ring shank against a controlled oval mandrel profile while side pressure is applied through guide faces.
ideas.likely_main_part: Hardened steel mandrel block with stepped oval profiles, relief slots, and clamp-reference flats.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires smooth non-circular profiles, stepped size transitions, precise symmetry, edge reliefs, and functional datum surfaces.

ideas.idea_title: Watch Balance Staff Pivot Burnishing Jig
ideas.product_context: Watchmaking fixture used during restoration of mechanical watch balance assemblies.
ideas.core_function: Supports a balance staff at a fixed axis while exposing tiny pivots for controlled burnishing or polishing.
ideas.likely_main_part: Miniature V-block carriage with opposed jewel-like support seats and micro-adjustable stop geometry.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests tiny coaxial features, V-grooves, shallow cups, delicate clearances, and constrained tool-access openings.

ideas.product_context: Clock repair fixture for setting correct center distance between meshing gears before bushing plates.
ideas.core_function: Lets two clock arbors be positioned and locked so gear mesh depth can be inspected.
ideas.likely_main_part: Slotted gauge frame with parallel arbor channels, clamp lands, engraved scale recesses, and pivot bores.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines long slots, coaxial bore pairs, linear adjustability, scale features, and thin rigid frame geometry.

ideas.product_context: Wearable hardware repair tool for resizing metal watch bracelets and jewelry chain links.
ideas.core_function: Supports bracelet links while a press pin drives out friction-fit or split pins without deforming the link.
ideas.likely_main_part: Replaceable steel anvil with stepped link channels, pin-exit holes, chamfered entry guides, and underside locating boss.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires nested channels, small through-holes, chamfers, offsets for asymmetric links, and robust part orientation.

ideas.product_context: Precision repair jig for refinishing damaged screw heads from watches, eyeglasses, and small instruments.
ideas.core_function: Captures tiny screws at a repeatable height so the slot can be filed or polished squarely.
ideas.likely_main_part: Threaded holding plate with counterbored screw nests, screwdriver clearance windows, and indexing edge stops.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests miniature threads, counterbores, thin webs, slot alignment, and repeated small feature patterns.

ideas.product_context: Jewelry setting tool for aligning and checking prong spacing around round or oval stones.
ideas.core_function: Provides radial reference grooves that help bend prongs evenly before final stone tightening.
ideas.likely_main_part: Circular hardened plate with concentric stone seats, radial prong channels, and tapered access notches.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Challenges radial arrays, concentric shallow pockets, tapered slots, compound symmetry, and fine edge transitions.

ideas.idea_title: Pocket Watch Case Hinge Alignment Jig
ideas.product_context: Restoration fixture for repairing hinged pocket watch cases and lids.
ideas.core_function: Holds case body and lid hinge knuckles coaxially while a replacement hinge pin is fitted.
ideas.likely_main_part: Curved support saddle with adjustable hinge-axis cradle, clamp pads, and clearance cutouts for case lips.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires curved support surfaces, offset hinge-axis references, organic clearance pockets, and mixed cylindrical/planar datums.

ideas.idea_title: Earring Post Soldering Heat Sink Clamp
ideas.product_context: Jewelry repair tool for replacing or straightening earring posts without overheating decorative fronts.
ideas.core_function: Clamps the ornament face while exposing the post base and drawing heat away during soldering.
ideas.likely_main_part: Copper clamp jaw with shallow domed cavities, post clearance slot, alignment pins, and textured grip lands.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests thermal-mass geometry, shallow concave surfaces, narrow slots, paired alignment features, and ergonomic exterior shaping.

ideas.idea_title: Clock Escapement Pallet Fork Setting Fixture
ideas.product_context: Clock mechanism repair fixture for adjusting pallet geometry relative to an escape wheel.
ideas.core_function: Positions a pallet arbor and reference escape-wheel arc so lock and drop can be checked.
ideas.likely_main_part: Precision fixture plate with arbor jewel seats, angular reference slots, removable stop bosses, and curved inspection window.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines angular datum geometry, arc-shaped windows, small bearing seats, modular locating bosses, and mechanism-clearance modeling.

ideas.idea_title: Wearable Sensor Strap Lug Drill Guide
ideas.product_context: Wearable hardware fabrication jig for drilling consistent spring-bar or screw-bar holes in custom strap lugs.
ideas.core_function: Locates a drill bushing across paired lugs so holes remain coaxial and correctly spaced from the case body.
ideas.likely_main_part: U-shaped drill guide body with hardened bushing bore, lug-spacing bridge, case-radius relief, and clamp screw pads.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests U-channel geometry, coaxial transverse bores, replaceable bushing pockets, curved reliefs, and tolerance-critical mirrored features.
